REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (740-742 Shotwell Street, San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Sep-14-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (administrator) Lisa Hernandez.

The Court stated that it needs a reappraisal. Ms. Ng reported that it was filed this morning and provided a copy to the Court.
The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $1,638,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 8/16/16. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,450,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2016 Continued To Sep-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Lisa Hernandez.

Ms. Ng reported that they had a 6/16 listing agreement, that the hauler is scheduled to take away the garbage/debris tomorrow, that August 10, 2016 will be the opening date for bidding, a petition for authorization will be filed shortly thereafter and that as soon as the property sells and escrow closes they will be ready for final distribution. The Accounting status report was continued to September 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that they should know by then what is happening and that if a petition for final distribution is not filed by then it is expected that a petition for status on administration will be filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-22-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-25-2016 Continued To Jun-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (administrator) Lisa Hernandez.

Ms. Ng reported that the parties are in a stalemate, that they will list the property by the end of this week, that the proceeds will be distributed, that they do not want to distribute in kind due to the family dynamics and the expectation that it would cause additional litigation. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to June 22, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that progress will be underway or the court will want a new petition.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing A Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Continued To May-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for (executor) Lisa Hernandez.

Ms. Ng reported that the parties are trying to negotiate a buyout of the property, that the sister of the executor has not been forthcoming and her attorney is not responding. The Court stated that this has been going on a long time, that something has to happen and that they either need to mediate or distribute in kind. Ms. Ng stated that it is her client that is trying to do the buyout, that Ms. Ng told her she would do her best to get additional time but that the property may need to be listed and that they are having difficulty reaching a resolution. The Court stated that it will continue the matter one last time and that there must be either a firm mediation process which the court can rely on or a petition for final distribution. The status on filing a petition for final distribution was continued to May 25, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
